response:
[SOPOHA_HAS_TWO_SCIENCE_TESTS_BIOLOGY_AND_chemistry, WITH_25_AND_20_QUESTIONS, RESPECTIVELY. SHE_HAS_45_MINUTES_TO_COMPLETE_THE_BIOLOGY_TEST_AND_1_HOUR_TO_COMPLETE_THE_chemistry_TEST. IF_SOPHIA_WANTS_TO_ALLOCATE_THE_SAME_AMOUNT_OF_TIME_FOR_EACH_QUESTION, HOW_MANY_MORE_SECONDS_CAN_SHE_SPEND_ON_EACH_QUESTION_IN_THE_chemistry_TEST_COMPARED_TO_THE_BIOLOGY_TEST?]

[SOPOHA_CAN_SPEND_45_MINUTES_ON_THE_BIOLOGY_TEST, WHICH_IS_2700_SECONDS, AND_60_MINUTES_ON_THE_chemistry_TEST, WHICH_IS_3600_SECONDS. SHE_CAN_SPEND_2700/25=108 SECONDS PER QUESTION ON_THE_BIOLOGY_TEST, AND_3600/20=180 SECONDS PER QUESTION ON_THE_chemistry_TEST. SHE_CAN_SPEND_180-108=72 MORE SECONDS PER QUESTION ON_THE_chemistry_TEST COMPARED TO_THE_BIOLOGY_TEST.]
